title: Description for Dashboard Widgets
excerpt: It would be nice to add a description to each widget on dashboards that goes into more detail about any filters applied. Similar to the new description area on automations. Trying to include that info in the widget title…

posts.author: daniwhetstone (Danielle Whetstone)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be nice to add a description to each widget on dashboards that goes into more detail about any filters applied. Similar to the new description area on automations. Trying to include that info in the widget title makes the title too long or the widget has to be much too large so the entire title is visible.
